prompt: A clean corporate parody graphic on a plain light gray background, centered horizontally, styled like an official Microsoft product banner. On the left, show a layered cluster of 4 overlapping Microsoft Office-like app icons with glossy 3D depth and soft shadows: 1 large blue square tile in front with a bold white capital letter P, 1 orange rounded rectangle behind it at the upper left with a white pie-chart symbol, 1 white document sheet in the middle with a folded top-right corner, three blue horizontal text lines and a blue bar chart at the bottom, and 1 green spreadsheet tile behind on the right with a white grid pattern. On the right side, place the word Microsoft in small dark gray sans-serif type above a large product-name line that reads {argument name="headline text" default="Power harassment Ex"}. Render the large title in a Microsoft-style multicolor gradient spanning warm orange-red into purple-blue and cyan, with a crisp modern sans-serif look. Keep the composition minimal, wide, and balanced, with lots of empty space, resembling a polished tech company branding image or fake software logo announcement.
translatedPrompt: 一张简洁、极简主义的白色背景宣传图，采用官方 Microsoft 产品发布风格。在左侧，创建一个由 4 个重叠的 Office 风格元素组成的分层光面 3D 应用图标群：前方是一个带有粗体白色大写字母 P 的大型蓝色圆角方形磁贴；左上方是一个带有浅奶油色饼图符号的橙色圆角方形磁贴；中心是一张右上角折叠的白色文档页，带有 3 条水平蓝线和底部附近的 3 条蓝色柱状图；右后方是一个带有白色网格的绿色圆角方形电子表格磁贴。使用柔和的阴影、微妙的反射、平滑的圆角以及精致的现代 Fluent 设计外观。在右侧，将灰色小字 {argument name="brand text" default="Microsoft"} 放置在大型彩虹渐变产品标题 {argument name="product name" default="Power harassment Ex"} 上方，渐变色从橙红色过渡到紫色和蓝色，最后变为青色。保持构图宽阔且平衡，图标组占据左侧三分之一，文字占据右侧三分之二，留出大量负空间，边缘清晰如矢量图，呈现出一种略带幽默的虚构企业软件恶搞美学。

breakdown.creativeCore: 恶搞 Microsoft Office 产品图形：此提示词可生成一张简洁的 Microsoft 风格恶搞产品发布图片，包含分层的 Office 应用图标和色彩鲜艳的虚构软件标题，适用于模因或讽刺性科技品牌宣传。
breakdown.subject: 文字符号
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, grid, layered, horizontal]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: 3d]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
